results.snippet: FAQs Q: Is an L bracket stronger up or down? A: L-shaped metal brackets are typically stronger in the vertical orientation ("up") as this configuration resists downward forces more effectively. results.title: Metal L-Brackets | Marlin Steel
results.snippet: True to its name, an L-bracket is a brace with a right angle, which creates an "L" shape. Also called angle brackets or corner brackets, L-brackets are available in a wide variety of sizes and reinforcement options.
